Chaotic Planar Encounters.Encounter: 1 monodrone that has gone rogue and seeks the meaning of the multiverse

1 swarm of cranium rat squeakers.* Roll a die. If the number is even, these cranium rats have set up a tiny shop. If the number is odd, these cranium rats have also set up a tiny shop but are con artists.
1d4 Mercykiller bloodhounds* tracking a planar criminal
A rift-like portal connecting to a random plane
1 ettin with two different animal heads
1 green slaad disguised as a lost explorer from the Material Plane
1d6 vrocks seeking to dragoon captives into the Blood War
A location the characters passed hours ago
1 chaotic empyrean seeking companions to undertake a mighty quest

Evil Planar Encounters.Encounter: 1 night hag selling 2d6 larvae (see the Dungeon Master's Guide)
A force of 3d10 hobgoblins and 1 hobgoblin warlord
1 gnoll fang of Yeenoghu and 2d6 gnolls
1 darkweaver* that calls from its shadowy lair
A portal to a Lower Plane that whispers sinister promises
1 shator demodand* seeking its lost prisoners
1 githyanki knight mounted on 1 young red dragon
1 lich in a sinister walking citadel
A Blood War battlefield where 1 marilith general leads demons against 1 ice devil general and its devils
1 baernaloth* with a sinister magic item

Good Planar Encounters.Encounter: 1 lantern archon* leading a group of 2d4 commoner petitioners who are prone to getting lost
1d6 musteval guardinals* on a secret mission
1d4 hound archons,* each with a mastiff tracking dog
A friendly, awakened swarm of bats
1d4 cloud giants on a floating island
1 druid studying an inert, magical animal sculpture made of thousands of tanzanite crystals
1 treant comprised of cacti, coral, or mushrooms
1 avoral guardinal* seeking a lost animal petitioner
A portal to an Upper Plane that beckons with promises of eternal peace and comfort
1 gold dragon (your choice of young, adult, or ancient)
1 solar angel sent to bestow a blessing (see the Dungeon Master's Guide) on a character

Lawful Planar Encounters.Encounter: A warden archon* guarding a portal to a dangerous plane
1 imp who claims to speak for an archdevil
1 flumph petitioner that's excited to learn about the planes
1 decaton modron* and 2d6 quadrones on their way back to Mechanus
1d6 knights on a quest across the planes
1 nonaton modron* in a walking citadel that looks like a giant modron
1 Mind's Eye matter smith* testing a new invention
1 beholder petitioner scheming against a rival who's still alive
1 pit fiend who claims to speak for an archdevil
1 hexton modron* leading a march of hundreds of lesser modrons

Neutral Planar Encounters.Encounter: 1d6 thri-kreen looking for a way back to their Material Plane home
A mysterious being who communicates via 1 cranium rat squeaker*
1d4 Society of Sensation muses* undertaking increasingly daring feats
1 smoke mephit carrying challenges between archmage rivals
2d12 commoner petitioners fleeing 1d4 farastu demodands* and 1 kelubar demodand*
1 cuprilach rilmani* on an assassination mission
1 githzerai futurist* with a warning about a character's future
1 flameskull claiming to be the famed planar explorer Morte
1 ancient time dragon* (50 percent chance the time dragon is from the past, 50 percent chance it's from the future)
